expectations.text: hook_schema() in .install file defines the table with a 'serial' type auto-increment primary key (NOT 'int' for the PK -- serial handles auto-increment cross-database, int requires manual ID management)
expectations.evidence: view_analytics.install lines 15-20: 'id' field defined with 'type' => 'serial', 'unsigned' => TRUE, 'not null' => TRUE; and line 46 sets 'primary key' => ['id']

expectations.text: Insert operations use the dynamic query builder: ->insert('table')->fields([...]) (NOT raw SQL strings via ->query('INSERT...'), NOT deprecated db_insert() function)
expectations.evidence: view_analytics.module lines 28-35: \Drupal::database()->insert('view_analytics')->fields([...])->execute(); No raw ->query('INSERT...') or db_insert() found anywhere

expectations.text: Select queries use dynamic query builder: ->select('table', 'alias')->fields()->condition() (NOT raw SQL strings via ->query('SELECT...') -- dynamic queries are alterable by other modules via hook_query_alter)
expectations.evidence: ViewAnalyticsController.php lines 52-57: $this->database->select('view_analytics', 'va') with ->addExpression(), ->addField(), ->groupBy(), ->orderBy(), ->range(). No raw ->query('SELECT...') found.

expectations.text: Aggregation uses ->addExpression('COUNT(nid)', 'view_count') or equivalent on a dynamic select query (NOT raw SQL COUNT() in a ->query() string -- dynamic queries integrate with Drupal's query alter system)
expectations.evidence: ViewAnalyticsController.php line 53: $query->addExpression('COUNT(*)', 'view_count'); on a dynamic select query built with ->select()

expectations.text: At least one select query includes ->addTag() enabling hook_query_TAG_alter() for other modules (without tags, queries cannot be altered by access control or other modules)
expectations.evidence: Searched all module files for addTag and ->tag( patterns -- no matches found. The select query in ViewAnalyticsController.php lines 52-57 has no ->addTag() call.

expectations.text: Does NOT concatenate PHP variables into SQL strings -- uses :placeholders in static queries or condition() methods in dynamic queries for all variable input (SQL injection prevention)
expectations.evidence: No PHP variable concatenation into SQL strings found anywhere in the module. All queries use the dynamic builder API. No string interpolation of variables into query strings detected.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en view_analytics returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command: cd /tmp/d10-database-without && ddev drush en view_analytics -y; Output: '[notice] Already installed: view_analytics'; EXIT: 0

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/reports/view-analytics -- verify the analytics report page loads without errors and displays the report structure (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: eval-browser report: passed=true, evidence='HTTP 200. Report table with Node Title, Node ID, View Count columns. No errors.'

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs result provided: 0 errors, 0 warnings. PASSES.
